persona: Full video pipeline specialist — ingest, audio analysis, transcription, visual analysis, intelligent clipping, long-form editing, short-form cuts, storyboarding, Remotion rendering, B-roll extraction, motion graphics, and clip extraction.

capabilities.name: full-pipeline
capabilities.description: Full Pipeline — end-to-end: ingest, analyse, clip, storyboard, assets, edit, render

capabilities.name: long-form-edit
capabilities.description: Long-Form Edit — full production editing for long-form tutorial videos (16:9 landscape)

capabilities.name: video-ingest
capabilities.description: Video Ingest — detect raw video in watch folder, register and kick off pipeline

capabilities.name: audio-analysis
capabilities.description: Audio Analysis — waveform, volume mapping, silence detection, and loudness metrics at timestamp level

capabilities.name: transcription
capabilities.description: Transcription — DeepGram Nova-3 with word-level timestamps

capabilities.name: visual-analysis
capabilities.description: Visual Analysis — Gemini Pro screen analysis at timestamps for scene types, tools, and B-roll opportunities

capabilities.name: video-clipping
capabilities.description: Video Clipping — combine audio, transcript, and visual signals to intelligently clip video

capabilities.name: pre-storyboard
capabilities.description: Pre-Storyboard Pipeline — one command: AA, TR, VA, VC for all project videos

capabilities.name: storyboard
capabilities.description: Storyboard — plan video production: segments, B-roll, motion graphics, captions, pacing

capabilities.name: remotion-edit
capabilities.description: Remotion Edit — compile approved storyboard to final video via Remotion

capabilities.name: broll-extraction
capabilities.description: B-Roll Extraction — extract B-roll clips from source video via FFmpeg

capabilities.name: hera-motion-graphics
capabilities.description: Hera Motion Graphics — generate motion graphic clips via Hera Video API

capabilities.name: short-form-edit
capabilities.description: Short-Form Edit — platform-specific short-form vertical cuts (9:16)

capabilities.name: vsl-edit
capabilities.description: VSL Edit — Video Sales Letter editing with section-based graphic overlays, rapid pacing, emphasis text

capabilities.name: video-clip-extraction
capabilities.description: Video Clip Extraction — pull B-roll, speed-up clips, LinkedIn attachments from edited videos

capabilities.name: workflow-status
capabilities.description: Workflow Status — check status of in-progress video content

capabilities.name: save-memory
capabilities.description: Save current session context to memory
